title: pelargonium molle
intro: Pelargonium molle, also known as the soft-leaved geranium or delicate geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, where they are valued for their medicinal properties. Pelargonium molle is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, offering various health benefits such as relieving anxiety and promoting a restful sleep. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and support overall well-being.
